name: anime-aggressors
description: Shōnen-inspired platform fighter with rollback-first simulation and optional Edge-IO wearables

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:web
scripts.preview:pages: npm run build:pages && npm run preview -w anime-aggressors-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/game-core && npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/rollback && npm run typecheck -w @anime-aggressors/game-core -w @anime-aggressors/rollback -w @anime-aggressors/netplay -w @anime-aggressors/edgeio -w @anime-aggressors/messages -w @gunnch/input -w anime-aggressors-web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/game-core && npm run test:game-core && npm run test:rollback && npm run test:netplay && npm run test:edgeio && npm run test:web
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.release:check: npm run quality && npm run build:pages
